mapper.insert: insert into favorites (member_id, sido_nm, sigungu_nm, dong_nm, lawd_cd, memo) values (#{memberId}, #{sidoNm}, #{sigunguNm}, #{dongNm}, #{lawdCd}, #{memo})
mapper.select: select * from favorites where member_id = #{memberId} order by id desc
mapper.delete: delete from favorites where id = #{id} and member_id = #{memberId}
